name_en: Trending Style 👏👏YSL Saint Laurent SMALL MONOGRAM SAINT LAURENT Black Jacquard Embossed Stitched Leather Crossbody Bag ✈️YSL counter quality 😁Italian imported calfskin 👍Super soft to the touch 👍Classic soft shape front flap handbag, featuring metal-connected YSL logo, metal and leather chain strap, and horizontal and vertical jacquard embossed stitching. Chantilly lining 😎Strap can be folded or worn on the shoulder. Magnetic lock 🏆Vintage gold-tone hardware ✈️External back pocket 🚀Internal zip pocket 🎀🎀Dimensions 26x15x8cm, Model=26804
